_comment: ControlMT v2.2 banner values. Edit then re-run scripts/render_showcase.py. v2.1 was never publicly released — present v2.2 as the first release.
EVAL_SET_DESC: 800 pairs · 200 per style register · QE + reference scoring
SPEC_1: Single-pair · 100% of params dedicated to KN ↔ EN
STAND_1: vs IndicTrans2-200M-dist  ·  30% smaller  +  style control  +  code-mix
STAND_2: vs NLLB-distilled-600M  ·  77% smaller  ·  matches FLORES KN↔EN
STAND_3: vs NLLB-3.3B  ·  96% smaller  ·  ~12× faster per token
STAND_5: vs Google Translate API  ·  self-hosted  ·  no data leaves device
